# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
    "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json",
     "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
     "resources": [
        {
            "apiVersion": "[variables('VMSize')]",
            "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
            "name": "vmInterface",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]"
        }, 
        {
            "apiVersion": "[variables('VMSize')]",
            "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
            "name": "[parameters('VMName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]", 
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'vmInterface')]"
             ],
            "properties": {
                 "hardwareProfile":{
                    "vmSize":"Standard_D4s_v3" 
                },
                "osProfile": { 
                    "adminUsername":"[parameters('VMUsername')]",
                    "adminPassword": "[parameters('VMPassword')]",
                    "computerName":[parameters('VMName')],
                    "allowExtensionOperations": true
                },
                "networkProfile":{
                    "networkInterfaces":[{"id":"[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'vmInterface')]"}],
                        "dnsSettings":{
                        "dnsServers":[
                            "[parameters('DNSserver1')]",
                            "[parameters('DNSserver2')]"
                        ]
                    }
                }, 
                "storageProfile": {
                    "imageReference": {
                        "publisher":"Canonical", 
                        "offer":"UbuntuServer", 
                        "sku":"18.04-LTS", 
                        "version":"latest"
                    },
                    "osDisk":{
                        "createOption":"fromImage",
                        "cachingEnabled":true,
                        "managedDisk":{
                            "storageAccountType":"Premium_LRS"
                        }
                    }, 
                    "dataDisks":[
                            {
                                "name":"datadisk", 
                                "createOption":"empty",
                                "diskSizeGB": 50 
                            }
                    ]
                }, 
                "identity":{"type":"None"},
                "zone":"1" 
            }
        },
         {
            "apiVersion": "[variables('VMSize')]",
             "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets",
             "name": "[parameters('scaleSetName')]",
             "location": "[parameters('location')]", 
             "dependsOn":[
                 "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'vmInterface')]"
                ], 
             "properties": {
                  "virtualMachineProfile":{
                        "osProfile": { 
                            "adminUsername":"[parameters('VMUsername')]",
                            "adminPassword": "[<PASSWORD>('<PASSWORD>')]",
                            "computerName":[parameters('VMName')],
                            "allowExtensionOperations": true
                         },
                         "networkProfile":{
                              "networkInterfaces":[{"id":"[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'vmInterface')]"}],
                                "dnsSettings":{
                                    "dnsServers":[
                                        "[parameters('DNSserver1')]", 
                                        "[parameters('DNSserver2')]"
                                    ]
                                }
                        },
                        "storageProfile": {
                            "imageReference": {
                                "publisher":"Canonical", 
                                "offer":"UbuntuServer", 
                                "sku":"18.04-LTS", 
                                "version":"latest"
                            },
                           "osDisk":{
                            	"createOption":"fromImage", 
                               "cachingEnabled":true, 
                               "managedDisk":{
                               	  "storageAccountType":"Premium_LRS"
                            	 }
                          }, 
                         "dataDisks":[
                         		 {
                                  "name":"datadisk", 
                                  "createOption":"empty",
                                 "diskSizeGB":50  
                              }
                            ]
                           },
                        "identity":{"type":"None"},
                      },
                      "virtualMachineScaleSetPriority":"lowPriority", 
                      "sku":{
                        	"tier":"Standard", 
                            "capacity": "[parameters('VMCapacity')]"
                        }
                     }
         }
     ],
    "outputs": {
         "Virtual Machine Scale Set ID" :{
              "type": "String",
               "value":[
                  "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets', parameters('scaleSetName'))]",
                ] 
            },
          "Virtual Machine Scale Set Name":{
              	"type":"String", 
              	 "value":"[parameters('scaleSetName')]"
            }
